languages.text: Обезглавленный змееподобный ксенос стоит прямо, свирепо растопырив когти. Каким-то образом в нем все еще поддерживается жизнь.
The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.
languages.original_text: Обезглавленный змееподобный ксенос стоит прямо, свирепо растопырив когти. Каким-то образом в нем все еще поддерживается жизнь.

traits.locale_text: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.

languages.text: El xenos serpentino decapitado se yergue con garras extendidas en gesto brutal. De alguna forma, sigue vivo.
languages.original_text: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.

traits.locale_text: El xenos serpentino decapitado se yergue con garras extendidas en gesto brutal. De alguna forma, sigue vivo.

languages.text: Le xénos serpentin décapité se tient debout, les griffes tendues dans un geste menaçant, comme s'il était encore animé d'une étincelle de vie.
languages.original_text: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.

traits.locale_text: Le xénos serpentin décapité se tient debout, les griffes tendues dans un geste menaçant, comme s'il était encore animé d'une étincelle de vie.

languages.text: 无头蛇形异形直立而起，双爪大张，姿态凶恶。不知为何，它体内竟还有生机。
languages.original_text: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.

traits.locale_text: 无头蛇形异形直立而起，双爪大张，姿态凶恶。不知为何，它体内竟还有生机。

languages.text: Der enthauptete Schlangenxenos steht aufrecht mit ausgebreiteten Klauen vor dir. Irgendwie scheint noch Leben in ihm zu sein.
languages.original_text: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.

traits.locale_text: Der enthauptete Schlangenxenos steht aufrecht mit ausgebreiteten Klauen vor dir. Irgendwie scheint noch Leben in ihm zu sein.

languages.text: Başı kesilmiş yılanımsı zeno, dimdik duruyor. Pençeleri acımasız bir hareketle ardına kadar açılmış. Yaşam, bir şekilde içinde varlığını sürdürüyor.
languages.original_text: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.

traits.locale_text: Başı kesilmiş yılanımsı zeno, dimdik duruyor. Pençeleri acımasız bir hareketle ardına kadar açılmış. Yaşam, bir şekilde içinde varlığını sürdürüyor.

languages.text: 首を切断された蛇のような異種族が、その鉤爪を凶悪な仕草で大きく広げて、直立している。何らかの手段によって、その内にはなおも生命が維持されている。
languages.original_text: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.

traits.locale_text: 首を切断された蛇のような異種族が、その鉤爪を凶悪な仕草で大きく広げて、直立している。何らかの手段によって、その内にはなおも生命が維持されている。
